title: PacSet Third Impact Tour of Japan scheduled for October 2014
display_title: PacSet Third Impact Tour of Japan scheduled for October 2014
wikitext:
[]: PacSet Third Impact Tour of Japan scheduled for October 2014             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sat Jun 14, 2014 3:12 pm PacSet Tours is in fact doing an EVA-themed trip to Japan, scheduled for Oct 20-29. This is a 10-day tour package that includes Tokyo, Matsumoto, and Hakone (in other words Tokyo-1, 2 & 3) and from the itinerary looks like it goes just about everywhere related to EVA except Anno's front porch. They're listing the tour at $3295 with a 20-person limit. You can pay on the installment plan. Link is below: [url]https://pacsettours.com/portfolios/third-impact/#.U5yrT9Q-Bwk[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Jun 16, 2014 3:48 pm I'm going on this thing. After years of procrastinating my Japan trip I said fuck it and booked late last year. I plan to spend a few more days in Tokyo after the tour and hit up Ooarai in Ibarakai (site of Girls Und Panzer) and the Ghibli Museum. I do hope that the relocated Eva store which is supposed to open in October after the Harajuku site closed is already up and running. Edit: Pacset update:
